media.altText: E-biking through a quiet Naxi village lane with green fields and a mountain backdrop

sections.subtitle: Ride across real Naxi villages
sections.text: Pickup from your Lijiang hotel, then set off on an e-bike handed to Naxi villages. Lukasz leads a relaxed 10 km loop past gardens and groves to a hidden church, century-old courtyards, and a gongfu tea ceremony in a peaceful village. Stop by at the Green Dragon Park and ancient Shuhe Old Town. You'll come home knowing where your Lijiang vegetables came from.

items.title: What's Special
items.subtitle: Authentic village life
items.highlight: An e-bike ride through Naxi villages away from tourist crowds.

items.title: Duration
items.subtitle: Half-day
items.highlight: Morning: 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM | Afternoon: 2:00 PM to 6:00 PM

items.title: Activity Level
items.subtitle: Easy
items.highlight: E-biking: 10 km | Walking: 1-2 km, Slow Pace

badge.label: A Quiet Ride Through Working Villages

items.title: Authentic Village Life
items.subtitle: Off-the-Tourist-Path
items.text: Ride past the Old Town straight into the slow, lived-in rhythm of real Naxi villages — the kind of places tour buses never reach.

image.altText: Daily life in a Naxi village near Lijiang

items.title: Hundred Year Old Courtyard
items.subtitle: Ming & Qing Architecture
items.text: Step into a courtyard home of a Dongba culture master that's been lived in for over a century — learn about its history and architectural mastery.

items.title: Gongfu Tea Ceremony
items.subtitle: Mountain Tea House
items.text: Pause for a traditional gongfu tea ceremony in a peaceful hamlet — local mountain tea leaves and a quiet conversation about village life.

image.altText: Gongfu tea ceremony in a village tea house

items.title: Peaceful Village Roads
items.subtitle: Flat Countryside Lanes
items.text: The e-bike makes the gentle hills feel flat. Glide along quiet village lanes with hardly a car, surrounded by fields, meadows and gardens.

image.altText: Quiet village road lined with trees near Lijiang

items.title: Vegetable and Fruit Gardens
items.subtitle: Working Farm Plots
items.text: Roll past grain fields, vegetable gardens and fruit tree grooves. Learn about Naxi seasonal rotation and what's growing right now.

image.altText: Vegetable and fruit garden in a Naxi village

items.title: Dragon Gate Residence
items.subtitle: 龙门居
items.text: Visit the Dragon Gate Residence, an opulent and strikingly impressive example of Lijiang's traditional merchant architecture.

image.altText: Dragon Gate Residence in a Lijiang village

items.title: Snow Mountain Views
items.subtitle: Yulong Range
items.text: Stop at viewpoints where the Jade Dragon Snow Mountain appears in full above the fields. Photo stop, deep breath, then carry on.

image.altText: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain view from a village road

items.title: Green Bean Ice-creams
items.subtitle: Seasonal Snack
items.text: Try a mung-bean ice cream from a village vendor — a cool, lightly sweet Yunnan specialty that's perfect on a sunny ride.

image.altText: Green bean ice cream from a village vendor

items.title: Hidden Church
items.subtitle: Local Curiosity
items.text: Tucked into a quiet side street stands a small church that serves local Naxi community — a secret piece of the region's missionary history.

image.altText: Hidden Catholic church in a Naxi village near Lijiang

items.title: Vast Fields and Grasslands
items.subtitle: Rural Panoramas
items.text: Between villages the road opens into wide fields and grasslands that change colour with the season — gold in the winter and soft green in the spring.

image.altText: Vast fields and grasslands around Lijiang villages

items.title: Green Dragon Park
items.subtitle: Park Walk
items.text: Park the bikes for a short walk through Green Dragon Park, a leafy oasis along a small stream and a quiet wooden pavilion.

items.title: Shuhe Old Town
items.subtitle: 束河古镇
items.text: Enter Shuhe Old Town, the older sister of Lijiang Old Town. Cobblestone streets and horse caravan inns — perfect for a stroll before the ride back.

image.altText: Shuhe Old Town (束河古镇) cobblestone streets

days.title: An E-Bike Loop Through Naxi Villages

activities: Meet your guide at your Lijiang hotel for a short drive out of the Old Town, then hop on your e-bike for a relaxed 10 km loop through authentic Naxi villages. Ride past vegetable gardens and walnut groves to a hundred-year-old courtyard residence and the Dragon Gate Residence, with a quick stop at a hidden local church. Pause mid-ride for a gongfu tea ceremony, then continue past the fields and grasslands to Green Dragon Park, where you leave the bikes for a short walk through the spring-fed oasis and Shuhe Old Town, before riding back to Lijiang.

contactNote.text: For groups of 1 person or more than 6 people

included.text: English-Speaking Coordinator/Guide (Lukasz Madrzynski), E-Bike and Helmet, Gongfu Tea Ceremony, Green Bean Ice Creams, Outdoor Travel Insurance.
included.notIncluded: Personal Expenses (Souvenirs, etc.), Voluntary Gratuities for the Guide
included.meetingPoint: Pickup: 9:00 AM (morning tour) or 2:00 PM (afternoon tour) at your Lijiang hotel | Return: Approximately 1:00 PM or 6:00 PM to your Lijiang hotel

sections.subtitle: Click on a question to reveal the answer

items.question: What are the age requirements to ride an e-bike?
items.answer: You must be at least 16 years old to ride electric bikes in China. Younger guests can ride as a passenger or follow the group in the support vehicle — please let us know in advance so we can arrange it.

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: Comfortable closed-toe shoes, sunglasses, sunscreen, a jacket for the breeze, and your camera. Helmets are provided.

items.question: Is this suitable for children?
items.answer: Only 16+ year olds are legally allowed to ride E-bikes on their own in China. Please contact us if you would like your younger child to join you as your passenger.

items.question: What's the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Full refund if cancelled 7+ days before the tour. 50% refund for 3-6 days. No refund within 48 hours. Weather contingencies are treated as exceptions and are fully refunded.

items.question: What happens if it rains?
items.answer: This is a seasonal ecotour that happens during dry season with very little chances of rain. However, in case of rain we might need to cancel the tour and will fully refund your fee.

items.question: Are there any skill requirements?
items.answer: Basic bike-riding skill is enough. The route is mostly on flat village roads and e-bike handles the slight inclinations well.

items.question: How do I get to the meeting point?
items.answer: We will pick you up from any hotel in Lijiang Old Town or the surrounding area, then drive you to the starting point (around 10-20 min). If you're staying outside Lijiang, please contact us to arrange an alternative meeting point.

items.question: What language do the guides speak?
items.answer: We are fluent in English, Polish and Chinese.

items.question: How does this trip support conservation and sustainable development?
items.answer: Each booking directly supports local village business that are outside of tourist spots. E-bikes are zero-emission at the point of use, and our small-group format (max 6) keeps the village lanes quiet and respectful.

title.text: Ready to Ride Across Real Naxi Villages?

seo.metaTitle: E-Biking Lijiang Villages Tour | Yunnan Half-Day Naxi Village Ride
seo.metaDescription: Pedal through authentic Naxi villages on a quality e-bike from Lijiang Old Town, Yunnan, China. Visit courtyard homes, a hidden church, and farm fields with a local guide. Small-group half-day Yunnan eco tour.
